name: repo-ray
title: RepoRay
description: Quickly open or clone git repositories from Raycast
author: nikolai

preferences.name: projectDirectories
preferences.title: Project Directories
preferences.description: Comma-separated list of directories to scan for git repositories (e.g. ~/Documents, ~/Work)

commands.name: open-repo
commands.title: Open Repo
commands.description: Search defined directories for git projects and open them in an editor of your choice

preferences.name: editor1
preferences.title: Editor 1
preferences.description: First editor shown in the selection list

commands.name: clone-repo
commands.title: Clone Repository
commands.description: Clone a git repository into one of your project directories
